title: Sauna chair with herbal essential oils
abstract: The present disclosure relates to a sauna chair with herbal essential oils (1) is configured with a chair body (10), a herbal essential oil producer (20), a herbal essential oil conducting pipe and supply system (30), a controller (40), and a power supply (50). The medicinal essential oils produced from the herbal essential oil producer (20) guided into acupuncture points on the human, chakras to cells or areas to be treated of the person sitting in the chair through the herbal essential oil conducting pipe and supply system (30).
claims:
Claims [CLAIMS] [Claim 1] A sauna chair with herbal essential oils (1) is configured to include a chair body (10), an herbal essential oil producer (20), an herbal essential oil conducting pipe and supply system (30), a controller (40), and a power supply (50), wherein: the herbal essential oil producer (20) is configured to include: a body (21) formed with a long-closed rectangular box forming the hollow space (22) therein, wherein the body (21) formed with a first outlet (211) formed on the top surface, a second outlet (212) formed on one side, a fitting outlet (213) formed on one end of the body (21), and a pair of guiding rails (214) mounted on two inner surfaces of corresponding sides of the body (21); a blower box (23) fixed to one side of the body (21) and communicated to the hollow space (22) through the second outlet (212), wherein the blower box (23) has an air intake hole (231) and a blower (232) arranged inside the blower box (23); a medicinal tray (24) inserted into the hollow space (22) from the fitting outlet (213) and slides on the guiding rails (214); a thermal generating plate (25) operates as radiant heat plate which installed inside the hollow space (22) from the fitting outlet (213) and located under the medicinal tray (24) to provide heat between 60Â°C and 90Â°C for the medicinal tray (24); and a herb essential oil dispenser (26) disposed on the top of the body (21) and communicated to the body (21) through the first outlet (211), wherein the herb essential oil dispenser (26) has a plurality of dividers (261). [Claim 2] The sauna chair of claim 1, wherein the chair body (10) configured to include: a support frame (11); a backrest and headrest portion (12), a seat portion (13), a leg support portion (14), a pair of arm support portions (15) connected respectively by dynamic joints so that they can be rotated relatively to each other, and supported on the support frame (11); a seat reclining adjustment 

 mechanism (16) disposed on the support frame (11); a plurality of outputs (17) disposed at the predetermined positions on the backrest and headrest portion (12), the leg support portion (14) and the arm support portions (15), the outputs 17 from which the medicinal essential oils penetrating enter the body of the person sitting on the chair (1). [Claim 3] The sauna chair of claim 2, wherein the rotary angle adjustment mechanism (16) is the hydraulic mechanism operated by the controller (40) for adjusting the postures of the backrest and headrest portion (12), the seat (13), the leg support portion (14), the arm support portions (15). [Claim 4] The sauna chair of claim 1, wherein the herbal essential-oil conducting pipe and supply system (30) configured to include: a backrest essential-oil conducting pipe (31) having a backrest essential-oil output (311) at its one end; a shoulder essential-oil conducting pipe (32) having a pair of shoulder essential-oil outputs (321) at its one end; a head essential-oil conducting pipe (33) having a head essential-oil output (331) at its one end; a pair of the armrest essential-oil conducting pipes (34) having a pair of the armrest essential-oil outputs (341), respectively; the food essential-oil conducting pipe (35) having the food essential-oil output (351) at its one end; and connection box (36) to which all essential-oil conducting pipes (31, 32, 33, 34, 35) connected, wherein, the backrest essential-oil output (311), the pair of the shoulder essential-oil outputs (321), the pair of the armrest essential-oil outputs (341), and the pair of the food essential-oil outputs (351) connected respectively to the outputs (17) of the backrest and headrest portion (12), the leg support portion (14) and the arm support portions (15). [Claim 5] The sauna chair of claim 4, wherein the other ends of the backrest essential-oil conducting pipe (31), the shoulder essential-oil conducting pipe (32), the head essential-oil conducting pipe (33), the pair of the armrest essential-oil 

 conducting pipes (34), and the food essential-oil conducting pipe (35) connected respectively to the dividers (261) of the medicinal essential oil dispenser (26) of the herbal essential oil producer (20) through the connection box (36), whereby the essential oils produced from the herbal essential oils producer (20) to be guided into the human body through the essential oil conducting pipe and supply system (30) and the blower (232). [Claim 6] The sauna chair of claim 4 or 5, wherein the backrest essential-oil conducting pipe (31), the shoulder essential-oil conducting pipe (32), the head essential-oil conducting pipe (33), the pair of the armrest essential-oil conducting pipes (34), and the food essential-oil conducting pipe (35) of the essential oil conducting pipe and supply system (30) are made of soft material and embedded in the chair body (10). [Claim 7] The sauna chair of claim 1 , wherein the herbal essential oil producer (20) further includes a temperature sensor (27) arranged inside the essential oil dispenser (26) for sensing temperature of range from 37Â°C to 42Â°C under the program of the controller (40). [Claim 8] The sauna chair of any claims from 1 to 7, wherein the blower (232) blows the medicinal essential oils produced from the medicinal herbs inside the medicinal tray (24) going the backrest essential-oil conducting pipe (31), the shoulder essential-oil conducting pipe (32), the head essential-oil conducting pipe (33), the pair of the armrest essential-oil conducting pipes (34), and the food essential-oil conducting pipe (35) of the essential oil conducting pipe and supply system (30) through the essential oil dispenser (26) and outputting from the plurality of outputs (17), wherein the blower (232) starts/stops under the program of the controller (40).
